   • Meals & Restaurants: Estimating around €40 per person per day for family-friendly options, this would total roughly €200–€250 per person for 5 days.
   • Activities: You could choose a mix of cultural tours (e.g., City Walking Tour for about €20 per person) and maybe a museum day pass (€30) or a local family-oriented excursion.

3. Destination: Barcelona, Spain
